translations.Encrypt per-user data -- in particular t: Encrypt per-user data -- in particular their email passwords -- with their personal cloud password. This implies that these settings will be lost when users forget their passwords. If unchecked the email login credentials are still protected by the server secret. The latter implies that an administrator is able to decrypt the login credentials, but the configuration data survives user password-loss.
translations.Unable to obtain email credentials for \: Unable to obtain email credentials for "{emailUserId}". Please check your personal Roundcube settings.
translations.Globally configured as user's email addr: Globally configured as user's email address, see user's personal settings.

translations.Unable to access the contents of the wra:
دسترسی به محتوای نمونهٔ پوشش‌داده‌شدهٔ {wrappedApp} ممکن نبود.
این مشکل ممکن است ناشی از محدودیت‌های دسترسی میان‌دامنه‌ای باشد.
لطفاً بررسی کنید که نمونهٔ Nextcloud شما ({nextcloudUrl}) و نمونهٔ پوشش‌داده‌شدهٔ {wrappedApp} ({iFrameUrl}) از یک دامنهٔ یکسان ارائه می‌شوند.
